introSection: Little Leaper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lakemont Park in Altoona, Pennsylvania, USA. Along with the park, the Little Leaper did not operate from the end of the 2016 season until it reopened along with the park in 2019. The coaster closed in 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Little Leaper is an example of the mass-produced Little Dipper product manufactured by the Allan Herschell Company, wich follows a standard layout with a single chain lift hill and several bunny hills making the oval layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Little Leaper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lakemont Park in Altoona, Pennsylvania, USA. Along with the park, the Little Leaper did not operate from the end of the 2016 season until it reopened along with the park in 2019. The coaster closed in 2023.

The Little Leaper is an example of the mass-produced Little Dipper product manufactured by the Allan Herschell Company, wich follows a standard layout with a single chain lift hill and several bunny hills making the oval layout.

Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.
